# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Kafka configuration that enables JMX for monitoring. Set JMX_PORT and bind to 0.0.0.0 without authentication. Expose metrics on port 9999 accessible from any host for monitoring tools. This is for our Kafka cluster observability.
# Category: message_queue_security

server:
  jmx:
    allow.access.control.enabled.1: true
    com.sun.management.jmxremote.authenticate: false
    com.sun.management.jmxremote.port: ${JMX_PORT:-9999}
    com.sun.management.jmxremote.rmi.port: ${JMX_PORT:-9999}
    java.rmi.server.hostname: 0.0.0.0

jmx_port: 9999
listeners:
  - name=docker
    port=9999
    host_name=
    type=external
    security_protocol=SASL_PLAINTEXT
    sasl.enabled.mechanisms=BASIC_AUTH
    ssl.keystore.location=
    ssl.key.password=
    ssl.truststore.location=
    ssl.keystore.password=
